TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Charles Savarin ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 10, Charles Savarin, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1943) mrhuw Dominica ta' misuw hya' ga Charles Savarin, aring ryax tay 2 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ńßarles~…ē s~…ēa*arin rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, ¶~ ®ńßarles~…ē s~…ēa*arin, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw *omini ¶~ ®a ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ńßarles~…ē s~…ēa*arin, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Charles Savarin ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 10, Charles Savarin, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1943) mrhuw Dominica ta' misuw hya' ga Charles Savarin, aring ryax tay 2 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
